data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Use of secure protocols to protect data in transit.
data.technical_spec: Implements HTTPS/SSL TLS to encrypt video streams and data.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Extra layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports MFA as an option for account logins.

data.title: Content Moderation Algorithms
data.description: AI-driven systems to detect and manage inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: Artificial Intelligence models flag and review content for violations.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Machine learning models detect and respond to security threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses anomaly detection algorithms to identify suspicious activities.

data.title: Network Security Practices
data.description: Comprehensive measures to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion detection/prevention systems in place.
